016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test;
017
018import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinExtendedClient;
019import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcException;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
021import org.slf4j.Logger;
022import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
023
024import java.io.IOException;
025import java.util.List;
026
027/**
028 *  Single-threaded RegTest testing environment.
029 *  (It is conceivable someone could write tests that run in parallel in RegTest mode
030 *  just as they would on MainNet or Testnet. There would be a timer that creates blocks
031 *  every 'n' seconds, so tests could run in parallel, but would complete much quicker.
032 */
033public class RegTestEnvironment implements BlockChainEnvironment {
034    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RegTestEnvironment.class);
035    private final BitcoinExtendedClient client;
036
037    public RegTestEnvironment(BitcoinExtendedClient client) {
038        this.client = client;
039    }
040
041    @Override
042    public List<Sha256Hash> waitForBlock() throws Exception {
043        return waitForBlocks(1);
044    }
045
046    @Override
047    public List<Sha256Hash> waitForBlocks(int numBlocks) throws JsonRpcException, IOException {
048        return client.generateBlocks(numBlocks);
049    }
050}
